key_themes: Mag 7 super-earnings night: Alphabet, Amazon, Meta, Microsoft all reported after the bell simultaneously
Federal Reserve holds rates steady at 3.5-3.75%; Powell confirms his last press conference as Fed Chair
Iran war drives oil above $100/bbl (Brent $118, WTI $107), fueling inflation concerns and Dow losses
Semiconductor earnings wave: Seagate +18%, NXP +26% (best day since 2010 IPO), Qualcomm surges on data center hyperscaler deal

stocks.reason: Q1 2026 earnings massive beat: revenue $109.9B vs $107.2B expected; Google Cloud +63% YoY to $20B; EPS $5.11 vs $2.63 expected; stock up ~7% after hours
Q1 2026 earnings beat: EPS $2.78 vs $1.64 expected, revenue $181.52B vs $177.3B expected; stock up ~4% after hours
Q1 2026 results: capex guidance raised to $125-145B (from $115-135B) on higher data center costs, user growth disappointed; stock fell ~7% after hours
Q2 2026 earnings beat; CEO announced data center chips shipping to "large hyperscaler" this calendar year; stock surged 16% reversing initial post-earnings dip
Q1 2026 earnings beat: revenue $3.18B (+12% YoY), EPS $3.05 vs $2.99 expected; stock surged 26% — best single day since 2010 IPO
Q3 2026 earnings beat drove stock up ~18% premarket and intraday; lifted related memory names Western Digital and Micron
Earnings beat and raised full-year outlook: global same-store sales guidance lifted to 5%+ (from 3%); stock climbed ~5-8%
Q1 2026 earnings miss: EPS 38¢ vs 43¢ expected, revenue $1.07B vs $1.18B expected; crypto trading fees collapsed 47%; stock tumbled ~14%
Significant earnings beat with strong forward guidance; stock up 8.76% to $336.77, one of the top S&P 500 gainers on the session
D.A. Davidson upgraded to Buy, raised PT to $375; stock rose 4.3% on AI data center GPU demand thesis ahead of May 5 earnings report
Q3 2026 earnings beat: adjusted EPS $2.90 vs $2.86 consensus; Chili's parent jumped ~13% intraday
Q1 2026 earnings beat on both top and bottom lines: EPS $1.80, revenue $1.06B; stock jumped ~10% premarket on results
Q1 2026 earnings results drove stock up ~18% on the session; midday mover highlighted by CNBC alongside Seagate and GE HealthCare
Closed up 12.54% to $3.41 on clean energy sector strength and an analyst price target boost
Q1 2026 earnings and revenue beat, but full-year revenue guidance came in below expectations; stock fell ~4.5% despite beat
